curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge commit (3b9ac44) in free5gc/ausf merging PR #52. Only 1 source file changed (internal/sbi/processor/ue_authentication.go) with 10 lines added. The fix adds two nil existence checks: one for the SUCI-SUPI pair mapping and one for the AUSF UE context, both before performing interface type assertions that would panic on nil values. Location derived from the patch diff, confirmed by the advisory description which names the GetSupiFromSuciSupiMap function and the UE authentication endpoint.
